title: What is LangChain in 5 minutes

Long chain provides a framework for developing the applications using the large language models. It provides easy to use abstraction for working with large language models. Large language model provides various components, various modules to consume the language models using the Azure OpenAI or OpenAI. The following are the modules as we see in the screen, model interface. So it provides an IOW interface to integrate and interact with the language models. Azure OpenAI or OpenAI. The other important feature is data connection. Currently, large language models are trained on the generic data. So it provides interface to interact, integrate with application specific data, domain specific data so that we can get more domain specific accurate predictions and results. And long chain also provides construct for the sequence of the calls and it provides memory to store the state between runs of a chain. Also, it provides the process to log the steps in between the chain. It provides prompts and once we got the response output, it provides output parsers to parse the data and it also provides various example selectors and it provides document loaders to load the documents and text spliters to split the text and it provides memory to store the state between the chain of calls and it provides various models access to various models and it also provides vector stores to store the data in the form of vectors and it provides retrievers to retrieve the application specific data or domain specific data. It helps to build the agents, chatbots and question answering systems and it provides a tabular data analysis and it also provides natural language APIs to integrate and interact with various natural language models and it also provides a provision to evaluate the results and it also provides way to extract the data and to summarize the data.
